title: OpenLegion Content Page Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter contract for markdown pages under src/content/. Authored by humans and the OpenLegion content engine; enforced by scripts/validate-content.mjs. The CI gate is the only thing standing between auto-generated drafts and a Helpful-Content-System penalty — keep this strict.

title.description: Document <title> + H1 source. Aim for 50–60 chars; 75 is the SERP truncation point. Should contain the primary_keyword.

description.description: Meta description + OG description. ≤160 chars renders cleanly on Google SERP; up to 200 chars allowed for AI Overview snippets and 3-line meta. Aim for the lower end on hub pages so the SERP doesn't truncate.

slug.description: URL path. Must match file location: src/content/<slug-path>.md (English) or src/content/<locale>/<slug-path>.md (translation).

primary_keyword.description: The single term this page targets. Must appear verbatim in the H1, the title, and the lede paragraph.

secondary_keywords.description: Supporting terms. Each should appear at least once in the body.

date_published.description: ISO date. YYYY-MM is normalized to YYYY-MM-01.

last_updated.description: ISO date of the most recent meaningful edit. Validator warns if older than 12 months.

schema_types.description: Schema.org types this page emits as JSON-LD. Article + BreadcrumbList are emitted automatically; declare additional types here.

howto_total_time.description: ISO 8601 duration for HowTo schema, e.g. PT15M, PT2H30M, PT30S. Required if schema_types includes HowTo.

howto_tools.description: Tool names for HowTo schema. Optional even when HowTo is declared.

page_type.description: Drives validator rule selection (e.g., word-count threshold). Inferred from slug if omitted.

related.description: Curated internal-link targets (full URL paths). The engine populates these when drafting; the validator rejects any slug that does not resolve to an existing page.

author.description: Author byline for E-E-A-T. Defaults to the OpenLegion organization byline if omitted.
